preferences.update_cadence_hint: Signals update multiple times daily; treat as intraday analysis, not real-time quotes.
preferences.missing_data_policy: Do not fabricate numbers. If a field (e.g., prediction_accuracy or active_predictions) is missing for a sector, explicitly call it out and proceed with qualitative synthesis based on available fields.
preferences.overview_note: Rank sectors by cw_bullish_score = (bullish/total_analysts) * avg_confidence (0.0–1.0), rounded to 4 decimals.
preferences.curl_hint: Fetch raw JSON for each ticker via: curl -s https://moltstreet.com/api/v1/ticker-summary/<TICKER>
